value.found_quote: Each teammate is a full, independent Claude Code session. You can message any teammate directly to give additional instructions, ask follow-up questions, or redirect their approach.
value.rationale: The page includes a "Talk to teammates directly" section describing exactly the claimed capability — messaging teammates directly to give instructions, ask questions, or redirect. The feature is part of agent teams, which the page states are experimental and disabled by default, hence beta/preview status.
